overview: Naturopathic medical practice offering functional medicine treatment for hormone imbalances. Dr. Jillian Smithers creates individualized treatment plans based on comprehensive lab work and detailed patient evaluation.
highlights: Telemedicine and in-office appointments available nationwide
Comprehensive hormone, thyroid, adrenal, and nutrient testing
Individualized treatment plans following detailed lab review
targetAudience: Women experiencing hormone-related health concerns including perimenopause, menopause, PCOS, thyroid conditions, and fertility issues.
